content.content:
PASS .tmp/findDuplicateOrderIds.test.ts
  findDuplicateOrderIds
    ✓ AC1: returns IDs that appear more than once
    ✓ AC2: returns an empty array when no IDs are duplicated
    ✓ AC3: completes in under 100ms for 1,000,000 IDs with ~1% duplicates (535 ms)
    ✓ AC4: each duplicate ID appears exactly once even when it occurs 3+ times
    ✓ AC5: returns an empty array for an empty input
    ✓ returns an empty array for a single-element input
    ✓ returns a single entry when all IDs are identical
    ✓ returns all distinct duplicate IDs when several IDs are duplicated
